title: Add public "Pulse" email address as CC

posts.author: Elad (Elad Hozainov)
posts.cookedHtml:
So, you got a nice feature that when you click on email address at one of the boards fields, it will create a new email with the “Pulse” address as CC to update your email into the updates.
The problem is that the “pulse” address you get in the CC it’s the “custom” address, i.e. only you as a board member can send an update.
The result is that when my client wants to answer and click on “replay all”, he will get back a return email with mistake.
I will be super helpful upgrade if it will be possible to choose in the column settings not just if I want to put the “pulse” address in CC, but also to choose which (the public / custom).
By that when your client react it can be updated directly to the “updates” automatically (instead of manually after…)

Screenshot 2025-05-18 130145340×283 10.1 KB
